title: Automate SAP order-to-cash with multi-agent AI & Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
summary: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) enables multi-agent automation of SAP order-to-cash workflows through APIs and the Model Context Protocol. The demo shows how to replace brittle RPA scripts with intelligent agents that reason, verify inventory, and execute tasks using Gemini's 1-million-token context window and parallel tool calling.
